name: Martha Washington's Devil's Food
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate over boiling water; add 1 cup sugar and 1/2 cup butter (or shortening) and stir until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add buttermilk and continue stirring over boiling water until the mixture is smooth.
3. Sift flour once, then measure and sift together with baking powder, soda, and salt three times.
4. Cream butter thoroughly, gradually add 3/4 cup sugar, and beat until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
6. Mix in about 1/4 of the flour mixture, then add the chocolate mixture and blend.
7. Alternately add remaining flour with buttermilk (or sour milk), mixing thoroughly after each addition.
8. Stir in vanilla.
9. Pour batter into a greased 15x9x2-inch pan.
10. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 30 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow cake to cool completely before trimming edges and cutting into half crosswise.
12. Assemble as a two-layer cake, carefully matching edges.
13. Spread tops and sides with Martha Washington's Fudge Frosting (See recipe) or add chopped nuts for filling.
